chinese_news.title: 抢体脂秤、AI做「搭子」，第一批网友冲向阿福减重
chinese_news.summary:
减重1亿斤，是什么概念？ 

简单算一笔“热量账”。按医学建议的安全减重速度（每周1-2斤）计算，一个人单打独斗，全部减完大概要花100多万年。

但如果把它拆分到全国人民身上，再加上专业健康AI“带减”，这个几乎不可能完成的目标就变得触手可及。

在国家卫健委等16部门联合倡议的“体重管理年”行动背景下，6月25日，AI健康应用“阿福”宣布正式上线“科学减重1亿斤”健康行动，包含三项核心动作：1分钱便能领的体脂秤，升级阿福的AI解读功能、为用户定制饮食和运动方案，以及即将开启的减重挑战赛。

chinese_news.title: 美光的好财报，黄金的坏消息
chinese_news.summary:
美东时间6月24日，存储巨头美光科技发布了2026 财年第三财季财报。数据显示，2026财年第三季度，公司实现收入415 亿美元，环比增长 74%，同比增长346%，连续第五个季度刷新历史纪录。同期，公司合并毛利率录得84.9%，环比提高10个百分点；经营现金流达到254亿美元，自由现金流为183亿美元，均创季度新高。

在业绩远超市场预期的同时，财报及后续的电话会中，美光还披露了16份SCA的细节，表示即便按照价格下限计算，现有签约订单在剩余合同周期内的累计价值仍高达1000亿美元，同时相关协议可为公司锁定220亿美元现金保证金及金融承诺。

受益于超预期业绩与千亿长协利好共振，截至发稿，美光盘后股价暴涨一度逼近16%，最终稳定维持在14%–16%的高位区间。受美光业绩超预期的催化，A股算力、半导体等 AI链细分板块当日全线走高；韩国市场亦同步走强，三星电子、SK海力士两大存储芯片龙头单日分别收涨 5%和13%。

chinese_news.title: 开放麦 | 启明创投胡奇：从AI算法工程师到投资人，与AI一起走过的十年
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以 ‘今年盛夏’ 为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些 ‘少数人’ 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

以下为开放麦内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: RoboScience机器科学发布Visics通用具身大模型，实现跨本体、跨物体、跨任务｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

6月24日，通用具身智能企业RoboScience机器科学通用具身大模型发布，首次完整披露自研Visics大模型的技术架构VLOA（Vision-Language-Object-Action），并展示了模型在家具拼装、灵巧抓取、动态流水线等多项真实场景的应用。

大语言模型有标准的文本Token，自动驾驶有统一的视觉或点云表征，这些基础格式的确定，让数据和模型可以在不同场景之间复用。但具身智能至今没有一个被行业公认的基础表征单元，其决定了数据如何采、模型从哪学、以及学习后是否能迁移至新场景。

过去两年，行业主流做法是让模型直接学习机器人的关节运动轨迹，即复刻某一个特定硬件在特定任务下的动作坐标。这套逻辑的问题在于，换一台机器人、换一个物体、换一个场景，模型此前所习得能力无法直接迁移复用。它学会的是“夹爪怎么抓起杯子”，而非理解“抓取”这个动作本身，即什么是抓、需要多大的力、物体受力后会怎么反应。

RoboScience机器科学创始人兼CEO田野指出，当前机器人操作面临

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 雷鸟创新 618 持续领跑 AR+智能眼镜品类，Q1 全球出货量再度登顶
chinese_news.summary:
2026 年上半年，全球智能眼镜市场迎来爆发式增长。IDC 数据显示全球 AR 市场（含 ER）同比增长 168.6%。国内市场的强劲增势同样印证了这一行业趋势，商务部大数据显示，2026 年 1 至 3 月，中国智能眼镜网络零售销售额同比增长 161.9%，AR 眼镜的受众圈层持续拓宽，正稳步渗透大众消费市场。

在激烈的竞争态势下，全球领先消费级 AR 品牌雷鸟创新（RayNeo）持续巩固其头部优势。Counterpoint Research、IDC、CINNO Research 三大权威机构数据一致显示，2026 年第一季度，雷鸟创新在全球及中国 AR 眼镜市场的出货量、销量均稳居第一，618 抢占国内主流电商平台 AR+智能眼镜全品类销量第一，实现上半年市场表现的“开门红”。

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Micron (MU) revenue exceed $50B for fiscal 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Micron investor relations official FY2026 earnings report
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr flagged Micron Q3 FY2026 results: $41.5B revenue (+74% QoQ, +346% YoY), free cash flow $183B—trajectory to $50B is mechanical if DRAM/NAND spot prices hold above current levels. English media missed the magnitude.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr broke Micron earnings details (June 24) before most English outlets; $254B operating cash flow, 84.9% gross margins signal AI capex cycle not peaking.

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran cargo ship attack near Oman + UN pausing evacuation operations + Trump requesting Iran war funding = Hormuz corridor risk priced as 2-3% tail event when historical geopolitical shocks suggest 15-25% probability.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC/BBC reported attack attribution but downstream oil market pricing remains flat; energy hedge funds underweighting geopolitical vol.

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Asset management giant formally filed; retail crypto Twitter underestimating institutional DeFi appetite.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will GM's 2027 GMC Sierra with new V8 engines contribute to EV/ICE ratio shift, causing legacy auto stock (F, GM) to outperform EV peers (TSLA) by >10% between June 30 and December 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Product cycle inflection (new V8 launch) contradicts EV-only narrative; profitability of truck segments underpriced vs. EV sentiment.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin has hit a power-law cycle low (~$58K); accumulation below $62K over next 60 days will precede $75K+ break by Q4 2026 as geopolitical premium (Iran, Venezuela) reprices into risk-on reopening.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph power-law model frames $58K as 'normal' cycle low, not capitulation.
Quant fund flagged rare onchain inflection alignment (CoinDesk).
Options traders hedging but not pricing extreme downside (Anchorage analysis).
Geopolitical uncertainty (Strait of Hormuz attack, Trump Iran funding request) creates short-term noise but long-term risk premium.
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin crash to $58K confirms bear flag; spot ETF outflows accelerating; Strategy (GBTC/IBIT proxy) unrealized losses widening suggests retail capitulation may extend to $50K or lower.
investment_theses.expression: Long spot BTC via IBIT or equivalent; or long BTC perps at 2-3x leverage on dip to $58-60K; exit on break above $70K.

investment_theses.thesis: Semiconductor capex cycle (ON Semi $7B TAM expansion, Micron $183B FCF, IBM sub-1nm chip debut) is peaking but margin compression is temporary; memory spot prices hold until late Q3 2026, supporting MU, NVDA, AMD outperformance vs. SPY.
supporting_signals: 36Kr flagged Micron FY2026 Q3: 84.9% gross margin, $254B operating cash flow—highest in cycle.
ON Semi TAM expansion signals structural AI chip demand durability.
IBM sub-1nm debut (Hacker News top discussion) de-risks TSMC/Samsung node competition fears.
Chinese AI capex data (36Kr) shows sustained GPU/memory procurement through June.
investment_theses.counter_view: Memory spot prices already declining in May 2026; Micron margins will compress Q4–Q1 2027; NVDA guidance disappointment likely if China capex stalls due to geopolitics.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU, NVDA, AMD vs. SPY (via sector rotation ETF: XSD or SMH); or long NVDA Dec 2026 $140 call; trim if gross margins fall below 75% in next ER.

investment_theses.thesis: DeFi institutional adoption wave (Kraken-Aave $385M deal, Invesco tokenized fund filing, BlackBerry 'uncrashable' AI layer) will drive Aave governance premium and ETH/BTC ratio expansion to 0.075+ by August 2026; underpriced relative to Solana/Sui competition.
supporting_signals: Kraken acquiring 15% Aave stake signals institutional confidence in lending protocol TAM.
Invesco formal SEC filing for stablecoin reserve fund removes regulatory overhang.
CoinDesk highlighted BlackBerry AI-robotics layer deal (uncrashable software)—validates blockchain infrastructure narrative.
CoinShares survey: 50% of UK wealth advisers still exclude crypto—suggests upside in institutional adoption curve.
investment_theses.counter_view: Aave governance token is overvalued relative to cash flows; regulatory uncertainty in EU/US could stall institutional onboarding; Hyperliquid/Sui may capture developer mindshare faster.
investment_theses.expression: Long AAVE spot or June 2026 $800 call; long ETH/BTC ratio via ETHBTC perpetual (target 0.075); trim on Aave governance risk vote or stablecoin regulation headline.

investment_theses.thesis: AR/smart glasses market inflection (Xreal dominance in China 618 sales, +168.6% YoY global growth) will accelerate consumer adoption; Ray-Ban Meta and Xreal partnerships with smartphone OEMs will drive EYE (hardware/wearable ETF) outperformance vs. XLK by 15%+ through year-end 2026.
supporting_signals: 36Kr flagged Q1 2026 AR glasses +161.9% growth in China; Xreal leadership in 618 (June 18 sales) is mainstream adoption signal.
IDC projects 50M+ cumulative units shipped by 2026; English media underestimating China TAM.
Hacker News: Apple price hikes on MacBooks/iPads signal hardware margin expansion; AR ecosystem capture next phase.
investment_theses.counter_view: AR glasses remain niche; consumer adoption slower than VC marketing suggests; Apple Vision Pro failure risk spilling into category; battery life and software maturity still 12–18 months away.
investment_theses.expression: Long ARKQ (ARK Innovation ETF, high AR/robotics exposure) or construct long wearables basket (GRMN, FITB, META); neutral on AAPL until AR roadmap clarity. Rebalance on Meta Vision Pro demand miss.

investment_theses.thesis: Geopolitical risk premium (Iran Strait of Hormuz attack, Trump Iran war funding request, Venezuela earthquake + political instability) will keep oil in $75–95 range and drive DXY strength (+3–5%) vs. EUR/JPY through September 2026; safe-haven trade (long USDC yield, short commodity FX pairs) is underpriced.
supporting_signals: CNBC/BBC reported Iran attack attribution; UN pausing Hormuz evacuations—corridor risk is live, not theoretical.
Trump requesting congressional Iran war funding is hawkish signal; Republican pushback suggests uncertainty but not de-escalation.
BBC: Venezuela earthquake + political turmoil (Maduro seized <6 months ago) = potential refugee/sanctions escalation.
Fed Goolsbee inflation hawkishness + Williams rate-cut ambiguity = DXY tailwinds (higher real rates attract capital).
investment_theses.counter_view: Oil markets have priced geopolitical shocks into $70–80 range; Trump-Iran talks could de-escalate quickly; DXY already strong; yield curve inversion limits upside for USD carry.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY future or short EUR/USD forward; long USDC yield (Aave, Compound); or hedge via long GLD (gold as geopolitical insurance) + short commodity baskets (DBC, CRB). Position size: 2–5% portfolio; stop-loss if Strait of Hormuz shipping normalizes (no new attacks >1 week).
